name: Verifier Labels
description: Shows who verified extreme demons on the level info page, with a link to their verification video.

issues.info: Report bugs or request features on GitHub.

show-label.name: Show Verifier Label
show-label.description: Shows who verified an extreme demon.

y-offset.name: Label Position
y-offset.description: Moves the label up or down relative to the creator name.

legacy-color.name: Legacy Grayscale
legacy-color.description: Displays the verifier's name in gray for legacy demons.

disable-cache.name: Disable Caching
disable-cache.description: Fetches data from the API every time instead of using cache. May slow things down.
